Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\berka\\AI-Information-Detection\\src\\lstm" && python -c "
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.read_csv\('data_center/ourDatas/cleaned_datas/final_dataset.csv'\)
print\('=== SHAPE ==='\)
print\('Rows:', df.shape[0], '| Cols:', df.shape[1]\)
print\('Columns:', list\(df.columns\)\)
print\(\)
print\('=== FIRST 5 ROWS ==='\)
print\(df.head\(\).to_string\(\)\)
print\(\)
print\('=== LABEL DISTRIBUTION ==='\)
print\(df.iloc[:,1].value_counts\(\)\)
print\(\)
print\('=== NULL CHECK ==='\)
print\(df.isnull\(\).sum\(\)\)
print\(\)
print\('=== TEXT STATS ==='\)
wc = df.iloc[:,0].astype\(str\).str.split\(\).str.len\(\)
print\(f'Words/sample: mean={wc.mean\(\):.0f}, median={wc.median\(\):.0f}, min={wc.min\(\)}, max={wc.max\(\)}'\)
print\(f'Chars/sample: mean={df.iloc[:,0].astype\(str\).str.len\(\).mean\(\):.0f}'\)
print\(\)
print\('=== DUPLICATE CHECK ==='\)
print\('Duplicate text rows:', df.duplicated\(subset=[df.columns[0]]\).sum\(\)\)
print\('Duplicate \(text+label\) rows:', df.duplicated\(\).sum\(\)\)
")

import os; os.environ['TF_CPP_MIN_LOG_LEVEL']='3'
import tensorflow as tf; tf.get_logger\(\).setLevel\('ERROR'\)
import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'models_one_by_one'\)
from bilstm2 import run_comparison, run_train_and_save
r = run_comparison\(use_cv=False\)
print\('COMPARISON_DONE'\)
best = max\(r, key=lambda n: r[n]['f1']\)
print\(f'BEST_MODEL: {best}  F1={r[best][\\"f1\\"]:.4f}'\)
model, tok, m = run_train_and_save\(best\)
print\('SAVE_DONE'\)
" 2>&1 | tee "C:\\Users\\berka\\AI-Information-Detection\\src\\lstm\\results\\comparison_run.log")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\berka\\AI-Information-Detection\\src\\lstm" && python -c "
import pandas as pd
import os

path = r'C:\\Users\\berka\\AI-Information-Detection\\src\\lstm\\data_center\\external_datasets\\cleaned_datas'

files = [
    'cleaned_HC3.csv',
    'cleaned_ai_human_detection_v1.csv', 
    'cleaned_Training_Essay_Data.csv',
]

for f in files:
    fp = os.path.join\(path, f\)
    df = pd.read_csv\(fp\)
    
    print\(f\\"\\n{'='*60}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"FILE: {f}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"{'='*60}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"Rows: {len\(df\)}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"Columns: {list\(df.columns\)}\\"\)
    
    print\(f\\"\\nLabel distribution:\\"\)
    print\(df['isGenerated'].value_counts\(\)\)
    
    print\(f\\"\\nNulls: text={df['text'].isna\(\).sum\(\)}, label={df['isGenerated'].isna\(\).sum\(\)}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"Exact duplicates: {df['text'].duplicated\(\).sum\(\)}\\"\)
    
    wc = df['text'].astype\(str\).str.split\(\).str.len\(\)
    print\(f\\"Words/sample: min={wc.min\(\)}, max={wc.max\(\)}, mean={wc.mean\(\):.0f}, median={wc.median\(\):.0f}\\"\)
    
    print\(f\\"Under 10 words: {\(wc < 10\).sum\(\)}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"Under 30 words: {\(wc < 30\).sum\(\)}\\"\)
    
    print\(f\\"\\nSample HUMAN \(label=0\):\\"\)
    h = df[df['isGenerated']==0]['text'].iloc[0]
    print\(f\\"  {h[:200]}...\\"\)
    print\(f\\"\\nSample AI \(label=1\):\\"\)
    a = df[df['isGenerated']==1]['text'].iloc[0]
    print\(f\\"  {a[:200]}...\\"\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\berka\\AI-Information-Detection\\src\\lstm" && python -c "
import pandas as pd

ext = r'C:\\Users\\berka\\AI-Information-Detection\\src\\lstm\\data_center\\external_datasets\\cleaned_datas'
own = r'C:\\Users\\berka\\AI-Information-Detection\\src\\lstm\\data_center\\ourDatas\\cleaned_datas'

hc3 = pd.read_csv\(f'{ext}\\\\cleaned_HC3.csv'\)
v1 = pd.read_csv\(f'{ext}\\\\cleaned_ai_human_detection_v1.csv'\)
essay = pd.read_csv\(f'{ext}\\\\cleaned_Training_Essay_Data.csv'\)
mine = pd.read_csv\(f'{own}\\\\final_dataset.csv'\)[['text','isGenerated']]

hc3 = hc3[hc3['text'].str.split\(\).str.len\(\) >= 30]
v1 = v1[v1['text'].str.split\(\).str.len\(\) >= 30]

print\(f'HC3 after filter: {len\(hc3\)}'\)
print\(f'V1 after filter: {len\(v1\)}'\)
print\(f'Essay: {len\(essay\)}'\)
print\(f'Mine: {len\(mine\)}'\)

combined = pd.concat\([
    hc3[['text','isGenerated']],
    v1[['text','isGenerated']],
    essay[['text','isGenerated']],
    mine[['text','isGenerated']]
], ignore_index=True\)

combined = combined.dropna\(\)
combined = combined.drop_duplicates\(subset=['text']\)
combined['isGenerated'] = combined['isGenerated'].astype\(int\)

print\(f'\\nToplam: {len\(combined\)}'\)
print\(f'Dagılım:\\n{combined[\\"isGenerated\\"].value_counts\(\)}'\)
print\(f'Human %: {\(combined[\\"isGenerated\\"]==0\).mean\(\)*100:.1f}%'\)
print\(f'AI %: {\(combined[\\"isGenerated\\"]==1\).mean\(\)*100:.1f}%'\)

out = r'C:\\Users\\berka\\AI-Information-Detection\\src\\lstm\\data_center\\combined_dataset.csv'
combined.to_csv\(out, index=False\)
print\(f'\\nSaved: {out}'\)
")
